headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Jumps But These Fertilizer Stocks Stink; Leisure Plays Cruise Higher (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones rose after President Trump spoke on Iran. A pharma stock tested an entry and cruise equities shined. Some fertilizer plays fell on the stock market today.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As These Leisure Plays Cruise Higher; Pharma Stock Clears Entry (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones index rose after President Trump spoke on Iran talks. A pharma stock cleared an entry. Nvidia rose on the stock market today.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges 700 Points On Trump's Iran Comments; Nvidia Stock Climbs (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes surged Monday as President Donald Trump announced productive peace talks with Iran. Nvidia was an early winner on the stock market today, as it looked to bounce back from recent losses.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Sherwin-Williams, Lowers Price Target to $371
summary: Mizuho  analyst John Roberts   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $410 to $371.
